summary: MR Order Form and PWA Testing Complete - All features working. Backend: 23/23 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including MR login, dashboard, orders page, new order form (customer search/selection, item search, text-based quantity input, out-of-stock toggle/restore, notes), order submission, cancel request flow. Admin panel shows MR orders with 'MR' source badge and 'via MR name' text. PWA manifest and service worker are accessible.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test orders created with 'TEST_' prefix in notes. Latest order: ORD-20260316-0014 with 2 items (Amoxicillin x15+3, Vitamin D3 x1).
context_for_next_testing_agent: MR Order Form fully tested. Key features verified: 1) MR Login at /mrvet/login with testdata selectors (mr-login-phone, mr-login-password, mr-login-submit). 2) MR Dashboard shows correct stats (customers, visits, followups, decks). 3) MR Orders page at /mrvet/orders with data-testid selectors (mr-orders-page, mr-new-order-btn, mr-order-customer-search, mr-order-item-search, mr-order-qty-{index}, mr-order-notes, mr-order-submit-btn). 4) Item search works - 'vita' finds Vitamin D3, 'amox' finds Amoxicillin. 5) Text quantity format works (e.g., '10+5', '15+3'). 6) Out of Stock toggle marks item with red badge and 'Restore' button. 7) Cancel request flow works with modal dialog. 8) Admin panel shows MR orders with indigo 'MR' badge and 'via Test MR' text. 9) Cancel Req badge shown on orders with pending cancellation. 10) PWA manifest at /mr-manifest.json and service worker at /mr-sw.js both accessible.

features_tested.MR Login (/mrvet/login): PASS - Login with phone 9876543211 and password testpass
features_tested.MR Dashboard (/mrvet/dashboard): PASS - Shows correct stats (1 customer, 7 visits, 1 active deck)
features_tested.MR Orders Page (/mrvet/orders): PASS - Order history displays with status badges
features_tested.New Order Form - Out of Stock Toggle: PASS - Marks item with red badge, shows 'Restore' button
features_tested.New Order Form - Restore Item: PASS - Restores quantity from out-of-stock state
features_tested.New Order Form - Place Order: PASS - Creates order successfully with order number
features_tested.Order Appears in List: PASS - New order shows in order history
features_tested.Cancel Request Flow: PASS - Modal opens, reason input works, shows 'Cancel Requested' badge
features_tested.Admin Orders - MR Badge: PASS - Indigo 'MR' badge next to MR-placed orders
features_tested.Admin Orders - via MR Name: PASS - Shows 'via Test MR' under customer info
features_tested.Admin Orders - Cancel Req Badge: PASS - Red 'Cancel Req' badge on orders with pending cancellation

api_tests_passed: GET /api/mr/orders - returns MR's orders with source='mr'
POST /api/mr/orders - creates order with text quantity format
GET /api/orders - Admin sees MR source and mr_name fields
